landing.cta.sign_in_database: Sign in to explore the database
landing.hero.title: Reduce ALS research uncertainty with traceable, cited intelligence
landing.hero.body: MTVL AI connects 15 public biomedical sources into a single investigator workspace. Ask questions, compare contradictions, and promote hypotheses—with every claim tied back to source evidence.
landing.hero.trust: Magic-link sign-in · Local SQLite storage · Human review gates
landing.database.title: Your database, ready to investigate
landing.database.body: MTVL AI keeps a local SQLite evidence store synced from public biomedical APIs. Inspect source coverage, freshness, and volume before you sign in—then query with grounded citations in the investigator workspace.
landing.database.ready: Database is online and query-ready on this instance.
landing.database.waiting: Database is online and waiting for the first ingestion run.
landing.rigor.title: Engineered for scientific rigor
landing.rigor.audit_body: Every synthesis cites claim IDs and source metadata. Reliability scores and extraction provenance stay inspectable—not buried in model weights.
landing.rigor.contradictions_body: Supporting and contradicting studies surface together. Failure atlases and debate protocols help you see why trials fail—not just what succeeded in abstracts.
landing.rigor.local_body: Run on your infrastructure with SQLite, optional Docker, and your own Ollama models. No mandatory cloud exfiltration for core workflows.
landing.features.title: A complete ecosystem for neurodegenerative data
landing.features.subtitle: Sophisticated tools built specifically for the high-dimensional challenges of ALS research.
landing.features.sync_body: Pull ALS-related records from PubMed, ClinicalTrials.gov, PMC, ChEMBL, GEO, and 10 more public sources on a schedule.
landing.features.extract_body: Normalize entities, relations, outcomes, and effect directions across all 15 public sources with inspectable provenance.
landing.features.chat_body: Ask investigation questions; answers cite in-database evidence via a local LLM (Ollama) with guardrails.
landing.features.hypothesis_body: Rank testable directions with supporting and contradictory evidence cards and reviewer sign-off gates.
landing.features.atlas_body: Map terminated trials and negative endpoints to root-cause patterns for investigator review.
landing.features.automation_body: Nightly ops, benchmark gates, and extraction fidelity checks before hypotheses are promoted.
landing.pipeline.title: The Investigation Pipeline
landing.pipeline.ingest_body: Scheduled sync from public biomedical APIs into your local evidence store.
landing.pipeline.structure_body: Extract entities, relations, outcomes, and trial provenance from raw documents.
landing.pipeline.investigate_body: Query, compare nodes, and generate synthesis reports with citations.
landing.pipeline.validate_body: Human reviewers approve, reject, or withhold promotion through explicit gates.
landing.governance.title: Research Governance & Ethics
landing.governance.body1: Canoniga is designed for scientific discovery support—not clinical decision-making. Outputs may be incomplete or affected by publication bias; all conclusions require experimental validation and qualified human oversight.
landing.governance.body2: The platform preserves contradictory findings, flags high-risk causal claims, and requires human sign-off for high-impact promotion paths. Governance docs are available offline at
landing.opensource.title: Deploy on your terms
landing.opensource.body: Docker-ready stack with Mailpit for dev auth, production SMTP checklist, and documented nightly-ops runbook. Fork, audit, and extend the pipeline.
landing.footer.body: Open-source ALS intelligence. Not medical advice. Not for patient diagnosis or treatment decisions. Research assistance only.
landing.lang.label: Language
